notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher MacKenzie Gore. Gabriel Arias scores. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Daniel Schneemann to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: David Fry grand slam
notableEvents.detail: David Fry homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field. Austin Hedges scores. Daniel Schneemann scores.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan triples (1) on a line drive to left fielder Josh Smith.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan lines out to left fielder Josh Smith.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Cam Cauley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Cauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Kyle Higashioka out at 2nd. Cam Cauley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Cauley rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cam Cauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Kyle Higashioka out at 2nd. Cam Cauley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith singles on a ground ball to left fielder David Fry. Kyle Higashioka to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Josh Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Daniel Schneemann to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Josh Smith out at 1st.
